/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/DungeonEscape.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DungeonEscape.dir/src/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DungeonEscape.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DungeonEscape.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o -o DungeonEscape  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
